title: Schizo and Parano Evangelion transcript and translation
display_title: Schizo and Parano Evangelion transcript and translation
wikitext:
[]: Schizo and Parano Evangelion transcript (and translation?)             Quote Post by Berserkelion » Wed May 13, 2020 2:35 pm I recently bought two books named Schizo and Parano Evangelion . I tried to transicpt with the highest accurancy the original Japanese text via Google Translate. Maybe we can eventually translate and add this on the Wiki. I'm not an English native speaker, so it would be a great thing to work all together on this precious material. Some partial translations are already available in other topics, but this would provide the right context. This is a transcription from the first chapter of Parano Evangelion , to begin with (pages 006-0032). There're footnotes too, but I have not yet transcribed them. Soon I could provide original text scans through the Italian Evangelion Wikia or Drive. SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: Schizo and Parano Evangelion transcript (and translation?)             Quote Post by FelipeFritschF » Thu Jun 04, 2020 2:39 am Yes, we have large portions of the books translated here: post/405232/Books-Shizo-Parano/ Collected in https://www.gwern.net/otaku I didn't check if what you posted here was present in that thread. As far as I understand, the translation we have wasn't exactly... ordered. If I might ask, what did you meant by using the Italian Wikia?

[]: Re: Schizo and Parano Evangelion transcript (and translation?)             Quote Post by Shun » Thu Jun 04, 2020 4:17 am The Italian wiki is this: https://evangelion.fandom.com/it/wiki/Interviste_e_fonti Gwern's website is known, it's great, but doesn't contain the total translation of Schizo and Parano , and about other Japanese materials. The goal is shared these materials around the world so that who know Japanese can help with translations. A collaboration all together.

[]: Re: Schizo and Parano Evangelion transcript (and translation?)             Quote Post by eldomtom2 » Wed Aug 05, 2020 2:41 pm A bit of a longshot to ask for this, but can you transcribe page 96 of Schizo ?

[]: Re: Schizo and Parano Evangelion transcript (and translation?)             Quote Post by Berserkelion » Thu Feb 18, 2021 5:45 pm Chapter III Introduction [pp.59-61] SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: Schizo and Parano Evangelion transcript (and translation?)             Quote Post by Blockio » Thu Feb 18, 2021 5:53 pm Since this thread got necroed, let me reply to this point: Berserkelion wrote: I tried to transicpt with the highest accurancy the original Japanese text via Google Translate. Maybe we can eventually translate and add this on the Wiki.

[]: Re: Schizo and Parano Evangelion transcript (and translation?)             Quote Post by Berserkelion » Fri Feb 19, 2021 5:21 am Blockio wrote: Since this thread got necroed, let me reply to this point: Berserkelion wrote: I tried to transicpt with the highest accurancy the original Japanese text via Google Translate. Maybe we can eventually translate and add this on the Wiki.

[]: Re: Schizo and Parano Evangelion transcript (and translation?)             Quote Post by Zusuchan » Fri Feb 19, 2021 5:46 am You said you tried to transcript the original Japanese characters through Google Translate, do you mean that you used Google Translate to get the Japanese characters for this? Well, that's acceptable, though there are better ways to do so, I'm sure. (There must be ways to install a Japanese keyboard onto your computer, for example). As for a possible translation, I'm afraid we're all out of luck. I don't know anyone with a good enough grasp on both Japanese and English and a willingness to work with EvaGeeks. Also, you quoted the entirety of Blockio's post, which is frowned upon generally here-only quote the parts of the post most relevant to what you're going to say. Edit: Just for clarification, about the translation business, what I meant was not that there aren't capable translators in the Evangelion fandom, but that there aren't really any who are either on EvaGeeks or have a mutual relationship with it.

[]: Re: Schizo and Parano Evangelion transcript (and translation?)             Quote Post by FelipeFritschF » Fri Feb 19, 2021 2:00 pm We do have them, and they are here too, but they're either inactive or focused on other things like Evangelion Original - I think I told you about some of the stuff being worked on. And like I mentioned a significant portion of Schizo and Parano are already translated, though I'm not sure about the pages proper. Either way it's unlikely this'll get much attention now - perhaps in the future and after Shin releases when folks get more active overall.

[]: Re: Schizo and Parano Evangelion transcript (and translation?)             Quote Post by Blockio » Fri Feb 19, 2021 2:28 pm Berserkelion wrote: I just don't understand why to specify this thing and in this tone, anyway. I said "we".

[]: Re: Schizo and Parano Evangelion transcript (and translation?)             Quote Post by FelipeFritschF » Fri Feb 19, 2021 2:43 pm Blockio, translations can be done cooperatively and I think that's what he meant. You can see Shun treated it the same way. I don't see why you need to act this hostile. His stuff on Wikipedia just needed some adjustments, I don't think you should assume bad faith or that he is actually spreading misinformation . Though Wikipedia, even in English, is not anyone's focus for Evangelion stuff as barely anyone reads or edits it compared to ours, he absolutely improved the articles since they were mostly abandoned for 10 years and he made them actually good. I should bring your attention to the fact that they were mostly written by Gwern and (gasp!) V at the time, so even if they're a lower priority it certainly helps to have better information there as well You might be aware how some of the myths were still present there until just recently even if we addressed them in our wiki for some years now (death threats, for instance). As far as I can tell he's also using most of our older translations too, for what it's worth. He's trying to help by posting the transcripts here so there's no need to disparage him. You're absolutely right regarding GT's transcriptions though. Just this week we compared those a bunch of times for some sources we're looking over and it quite often completely alters the meaning of a sentence. So it's problematic to use those, but scans are of course quite useful in case nobody owns them.

[]: Re: Schizo and Parano Evangelion transcript (and translation?)             Quote Post by Berserkelion » Tue Feb 23, 2021 9:04 am Blockio wrote: Berserkelion#910492 wrote: I just don't understand why to specify this thing and in this tone, anyway. I said "we".
